# ADR index

| ADR | Title | Status |
|-----|-------|--------|
| [0001](0001-embedded-file-local-persistence.md) | The appliance is self-contained — file-local persistence, nothing listening | Accepted |
| [0002](0002-structured-log-lines.md) | Log lines are structured JSON on stderr | Accepted |
| [0003](0003-postgresql-system-of-record.md) | PostgreSQL is the system of record | Accepted |
